positive: A complex, symmetrical celestial forest scene featuring stylized glowing mushrooms, interconnected geometric vine work, and constellations depicted as delicate linework. The color palette should use deep indigo, muted sage green, burnt terracotta, and brilliant gold accents. Style should mimic a high-contrast, detailed etching or woodblock print, combining neo-tribal motifs with cosmic elements. Composition must be centrally focused, designed as a repeating, isolated, ornamental panel with clean edges suitable for screen printing. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, ultra-detailed line art, maximum contrast, highly stylized, clean silhouette.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, out of focus, bad anatomy, deformed, noise, gradient, realistic photography, logos, trademarks, copyrighted material, cartoonish, solid background
